Preference.android:title: Import key from YubiKey
Preference.android:summary: Read and register the public key from your YubiKey for decryption

Preference.android:title: Generate new key
Preference.android:summary: Generate a new key for decryption

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Obfuscate PGP Markers
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Replace PGP BEGIN/END markers with a hex pattern to make messages harder to detect
